ItacPersonItem.Notes: Member of the Somascan religious order, Baldi was a theologian. he was elected Bishop of Chioggia in 1679. In 1649 he joined the Ricovrati Academy, where he had the charge of `contraddittore` (in 1652) and censor (in 1669).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
